title: plectranthus horridus
intro: Plectranthus horridus, also known as 'Starry Blue', is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. The plant is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Plectranthus horridus include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating skin conditions such as wounds and ulcers. The herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
